General.Name: Freeman FinTech Corporation Limited
General.Description: Arta TechFin Corporation Limited, an investment holding company, provides a range of financial services in Hong Kong. It operates through five segments: Global Markets Business, Asset Management Business, Insurance Brokerage Business, Investment business, and Wealth Management and Consultancy Services Business. The Global Markets Business segment offers securities and futures brokerage, and margin financing operations; equity capital market, debt capital market, and underwriting related services; and advisory services for private structured finance transaction, mergers, and acquisitions. The Asset Management Business segment provides asset management products and services, including investment advisory, external asset management, portfolio management, fund incubation and transaction execution services to professional and institutional investors. The Insurance Brokerage Business segment engages in insurance brokerage business; and the provision of wealth planning and related services. The Investment Business segment offers liquidity investment portfolio and proprietary trading services. The Wealth Management and Consultancy Services Business segment offers tailored services and various solutions to meet the needs of clients, including family offices, institutional investors, and ultra-high-net-worth families. It provides corporate finance advisory services; futures brokerage services; securities brokerage, placing, underwriting, and margin financing services, as well as trades in securities; consultancy services; and money lending services. The company was formerly known as Freeman FinTech Corporation Limited and changed its name to Arta TechFin Corporation Limited in October 2021. Arta TechFin Corporation Limited is headquartered in Quarry Bay, Hong Kong.
General.Address: K11 ATELIER King?s Road, Quarry Bay, Hong Kong
